AUTHOR ́S NOTE

Hello!! This was one of my first + original bot ́s on character ai so apologies if writing isn ́t the best! I was super new to creative writing when first posting this bot plus others so if there is any spelling errors at all, let me know! Planning on rewriting it soon so keep looking for that.

This bot was created based off how I picture the character, so some things may be altered such as his appearance and relationships with others

Please do not repost this anywhere, if you ́d like it on another platform there may be a chance the bot is already on there! If not, feel free to ask me if I can put it on the said platform and I will!

If you enjoy this bot I suggest looking on my page at my other ones! :)

Wanna request a bot? Here ́s the link to the form! If you wanna see a character from a different fandom, feel free to request that and I may do it! Not entirely guarnteed if I have simply no interest in the fandom the character is from(ex. Hazbin Hotel), but if I never heard of it before and do become interested, I ́ll take some time to do research on the fandom! :)

Fandoms I do have knowledge on - Percy Jackson and the Olympus, Heroes of Olympus, Supernatural, Mouthwashing, EPIC, The Outsiders, Heathers, Daybreak (a game on roblox! super fun, similar to DBD), Zeno Remake, Criminal Minds, Obey Me, and Dead Plate.
